from langchain import LLMChain, PromptTemplate

# Correct: instantiate the chain once at the module level
_PROMPT = PromptTemplate(template="Translate {text}", input_variables=["text"])
_CHAIN = LLMChain(llm=my_llm, prompt=_PROMPT)

def handle_request(user_input):
    return _CHAIN.run(text=user_input)
